sections.sectionTitle: Nuntakna a piathei Suang leh A Siangtho Minam

verses.text: Tua ahih manin gitlohna, zuauna, kineihkhemna, huaihamna, leh kigensiatnate na omsak nawn kei un
Naungek suakcilte na bang un la, note khangto-in hotkhiatna na ngahtheihna dingun kha thu tawh kisai nawizu siangtho duh belin na nei tawntung un
Bang hang hiam cih leh note in Topa' hoihna thu na thei khinzo uh hi
Mite in bangmahin kimanglo hi, ci-in a nilkhiat hangin Pasian in a manpha hi, ci-in a teel, nuntakna a piathei suangpi ahi Topa kiangah na pai un
Note zong nuntakna a piathei suangpi mah bangin kha thu tawh kisai biakinn lamna dingin na kizang un la, Jesuh Khrih hangin Pasian' san'theih biaknate a pia dingin a siangtho siampi na suak un
Bang hang hiam cih leh Lai Siangtho sungah, “A manpha suang khat ka teelkhia a, innkiu suang dingin Zion-ah ka koih hi. Amah a umte, zahhuai ngeilo ding hi,” ci-in na kigen hi
Tua ahih manin no a um mite-a' dingin amah pen a manpha suang hi a, ahi zongin amah a um lote-a' dingin, “Innlamte in a nilkhiat suang, innkiu suang bulpi a suak khinta hi

a cihna leh, “Hih suang pen mite' hoina suak ding a, hih suangpi pen a pukna uh suak ding hi,” a cihna bang hi ding hi. Amaute in lungdamna thu umlo uh ahih manin a puk uh ahi hi. Pasian in a tuaci ding mahin a deih ahi hi

Ahi zongin note pen Pasian in a hong teelkhiat minam, Kumpi siampi pawl, a siangtho minam, Pasian' mite na hi uh a, khuamial sung panin a lamdang mahmah ama khuavak sungah a hong samkhiapa' nasepna a lamdangte a genkhia dingin Pasian in a hong teel mite na hi uh hi
Nidangin Pasian' mi na hihloh uh hangin tu-in ama mi na hi uh a, nidangin Pasian' hehpihna na theihloh uh hangin tu-in ama hehpihna na ngah uh hi.
Ka itte aw, hih leitungah gamdang mi, a peempak bangin kingaihsun un la, na kha nuntakna uh tawh a kilehngat pumpi' deihnate na kikham un

Gentail mite in note mi hoihlo hi, ci-in hong gensia nuamin mawhna hong zon' ciangin, note' hoihna bekbek mu-in, Pasian a hong pai Ni ciangin a phattheihna dingun amaute lakah na gamtatna uh hoihsak tawntung un
Topa' hangin leitung ukna aana neite' thu na mang un. Kumpipa' thu ahi a
a gamtat siate gim pia-in, a gamtat hoihte a pahtawi dingin kumpipa in a sawl thuneite khempeuh' thu ahi zongin na mang un
Bang hang hiam cih leh thu theiloin a mot paupau mihaite, na gamtat hoihna un a daihsak ding, Pasian' deihna ahi hi
Sila a hilo mi bangin gamta un la, ahi zongin gitloh gamtatna dingin na suahtakna uh zang loin Pasian' sila bangin na gamtazaw un
Mi khempeuh zahtak bawlin thu uppih mite na it un la, Pasian zahtak bawlin kumpipa zong na zahtak un.
Nasemte aw, na tote uh thu na mang un. A thudik a migi na tote bek uh a zahtak hiloin a gilo na tote uh thu zong na mang un
Pasian' thu na ngaihsutna uh tawh a kilawm lopi mahin gimna na thuak uh leh na thuakna uh hangin Pasian in thupha hong pia ding hi

Note na gamtat khialhna uh hangin hong kisat ciangin lungduai takin na thuak manun bangmah phattuamna omlo hi. Ahi zongin a manin gamta napi-in gimna na thuak uh ciangin lungduai takin na thuak uh leh Pasian in thupha hong pia ding hi
Khrih mahmah in zong note-a' dingin thuakin, ama khekhap na zuihtheihna dingun etteh ding lim hong nusiat ahih manin hih bangin a thuakding mahin Pasian in note a hong sam ahi hi
Khialhna bangmah gamtalo a, zuau a genlam zong kiza ngeilo hi
Amah a kizahko ciangin na ko thuklo hi. Gimna a thuak ciangin na tawnggawp lo a, a manin thu a khen Pasian muan'in a na nei hi

Eite, mawhna lamah misi bangin, thuman lamah nungta-in i gamtat theihna dingin Khrih mahmah in eite' mawhna ama pumpi mahmah tawh singlamteh tungah a pua hi. Ama liamna hangin note in damna na ngah uh hi
Note, tuu bangin a gammang na hi uh a, ahi zongin note' kha nuntakna hong Cingin hong Kempa a zui dingin a hong kiciahpih kik khin na hi uh hi.
